description: You are a network engineer conducting a DNS audit for compliance reporting. Analyze the DNS traffic in the packet capture at /home/ga/Documents/captures/dns.cap and produce a comprehensive audit report at /home/ga/Documents/captures/dns_audit_report.txt. The report must include clearly labeled sections for: all unique domain names queried (listed one per line), all DNS record types observed with the count of queries for each type, the IP addresses of the DNS servers used, the total number of DNS query packets, and the total number of DNS response packets. Login credentials: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
